Event: Triumphant Adventure
Event Date: 30/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E74
Furor of Battle Engraving

Enhancement 1
Once in a while, the unit deals 37600 / 53800 / 76800 / 102400 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 physical damage to each of the enemy units in a large radius around, and each of the affected enemy units is frightened for 2 sec. The engraving's owner goes into a frenzy as well: their size increases, and all their stats are increased by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 2 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 75300 / 107500 / 153600 / 204800 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 physical damage to each of the enemy units in a large radius around, incoming damage to them is increased by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 3 sec., and each of the affected enemy units is frightened for 3 sec. The engraving's owner goes into a frenzy as well: their size increases, and all their stats are increased by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 112900 / 161300 / 230400 / 307200 / 384000 / 480000 / 600000 pure damage to all enemy units in a large radius, and gains a shield equal to 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of the damage dealt with the ability. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 4 sec. All affected enemy units have incoming damage against them increased by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% for 4 sec., and they become frightened for 4 sec. The engraving's owner also goes into a frenzy: their size increases, and all their stats are increased by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 sec.
